steps.title: Account for the shift
steps.content:
A shift up $8$ adds $8$ to every output.
$$
g(x)=f(x)+8
$$

steps.title: Evaluate the original function
steps.content:
At $x=5$, evaluate the original function.
$$
f(5)=(5-2)(5+4)(5-3)
$$
$$
f(5)=3\cdot 9\cdot 2=54
$$

steps.title: Add the vertical shift
steps.content: $$ g(5)=54+8=62 $$ The point $(5,b)$ uses this output. The answer is 62.
